message:
🐛 Fix useVersionCheck test URL filter after GitHub API proxy migration (#2506)

The GITHUB_API_URL constant was changed from the direct GitHub API URL
(api.github.com/repos/...) to a proxy path (/api/github/repos/...) but
the test's RELEASES_API_PATH filter was not updated to match, causing
two tests to fail because mockFetch calls were never matched.

Closes #2370

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
